weekStructure: Put it on — get comfortable wearing the persona in private and easy moments
Wear it out — bring the persona into low-stakes public moments
Stress-test — deliberately wear it in one hard moment per day
Own it — act from the persona by default and collect the proof

missionPool.text: Do your wear-session before any screen time this morning.
Fire your {trait} if-then once today, on purpose.
Walk through one doorway as {name} — posture, pace, eyes.
Catch one old-pattern thought and reframe it using your {trait} script.
Ask 'What would {name} do?' before one decision today — then do it.
Hold your persona for one full conversation without breaking.
Do one thing today you'd normally avoid, as {name}.
Fire your anchor before the hardest moment on today's calendar.
Say one sentence today with your persona's voice — slower, clearer, no hedging.
Run a mid-day pattern interrupt: 'old me or new me?' — choose new me visibly.
Wear {name} through your single hardest moment today, start to finish.
Tell one person about something as {name} would tell it — energy, pace, presence.
Do a full 10-minute deep-wear session instead of the short one.
Spend one hour acting from {trait} continuously — set a timer, stay in it.
Log one piece of evidence that you're becoming {name} — be specific.

wearScriptTemplate:
Sit or stand somewhere you won't be interrupted.

1. ARRIVE (30s) — Feet flat. One slow breath out. Let the old day drain.
2. THE MAGIC IF (60s) — Ask: 'If I were {name}, how would I be standing right now?' Adjust your body until it answers.
3. BUILD (2 min) — Put on today's focus: {traits}. Say the belief once out loud. Feel where it sits in your body.
4. GESTURE (30s) — Perform your signature gesture: {gesture}. Three times, then once invisibly.
5. SCENE (60s) — See one specific moment from today. Run it as {name} — what you say, how it resolves.
6. SEAL (15s) — Fire your anchor. Say: 'Today, I am {name}.' Open your eyes and go.

weekStructure: Foundation — body, voice, and physical life of the character
Inner life — beliefs, wants, and emotional register
Integration — full scenes in-character under mild pressure
Performance — hold the character under real stakes

missionPool.text: Do the voice & walk drill as {name} — ten steps, one sentence, combined.
Perform your psychological gesture three times, then fire the invisible version.
Order a coffee / greet someone in {name}'s physicality — no one should 'notice', but you should feel it.
Answer one real question today the way {name} would answer it.
Improvise 2 minutes alone as {name} reacting to today's news.
Write three lines of {name}'s inner monologue during a dull moment today.
Hold {name}'s emotional register ({traits}) through one full conversation.
Run today's hardest scene twice in rehearsal: once as you, once as {name}. Note the difference.
Do a full 10-minute deep-wear: dissolve your habits, assume {name}'s from the feet up.
Stay in {name}'s walk and posture for one continuous public hour.
Find one real person today who moves or speaks like {name}. Steal one detail.
Log evidence: one moment today where {name} felt more real than acting.

wearScriptTemplate:
Rehearsal space: anywhere you can move a little.

1. NEUTRAL (30s) — Shake out your own habits. Breath out. Blank body.
2. FEET FIRST (60s) — Step into {name}'s stance and walk. Let the walk tell you the tempo.
3. CENTER (60s) — Where does {name} lead from — chest, chin, hips? Move from there.
4. VOICE (60s) — One sentence in {name}'s voice: pace, pitch, weight. Repeat until it lands.
5. GESTURE (30s) — {gesture}. Full size three times, then invisible.
6. THE IF (60s) — 'If I were {name} walking into today's first scene…' Play the entry.
7. LOCK (15s) — Anchor. 'Scene one. I am {name}.' Go.

weekStructure: Private reps — build the persona where nobody's watching
Small rooms — one visible act per day among peers
Bigger rooms — speak up where it counts
Default mode — the new you is just how you show up

missionPool.text: Say one sentence in class or a group within the first 5 minutes — a question counts.
Do your wear-session before leaving your room this morning.
Greet one person by name today as {name} would — eyes up, clear voice.
Sit one row closer to the front than usual.
Ask one question you'd normally swallow — in class, office hours, or a message.
Do one 25-minute focused block with your phone in another room.
Start the assignment you're avoiding — 10 ugly minutes as {name}.
When the old excuse starts, say 'old me or new me?' and take one new-me step.
Contribute one full thought (2–3 sentences) in a discussion today.
Invite someone to study or hang out — as {name}, direct and light.
Walk across campus as {name} — pace down, shoulders back, eyes level.
Log evidence: one moment today the new you showed up before you had to force it.

wearScriptTemplate:
Before you leave your room (3 minutes):

1. RESET (30s) — Feet down, one big exhale. Yesterday is filed.
2. THE IF (60s) — 'If I were {name} walking into today, how would I move?' Stand that way now.
3. TODAY'S REP (60s) — Pick the one moment you'll use today — a class, a hallway, a conversation. See {name} handle it: {traits}.
4. GESTURE (20s) — {gesture}. Big once, invisible once.
5. GO (10s) — Anchor on. 'Today, I am {name}.' Door open.

weekStructure: The vision — make it vivid, sensory, and felt daily
The identity — become the person the vision belongs to
Aligned action — one real step per day, no exceptions
Evidence — track what's matching and double down

missionPool.text: Run your future-self scene for 3 minutes — sensory detail, then let the feeling of 'already done' rise.
Write one identity affirmation: 'I am becoming someone who…' — and say it as {name}.
Ask the interrogative version: 'Will I make this real? How?' — write the first answer down.
Take today's aligned action: one tiny real-world step toward the vision, within 24 hours.
Evidence hunt: log one real moment today that matched the vision, however small.
Spend 2 minutes in gratitude for one thing as if it just arrived.
Tell one person about your project or goal — as {name}, matter-of-fact, no apology.
Do the step you've been circling for days. Ten minutes, ugly version, today.
Upgrade one cue in your environment so the vision is visible daily.
When doubt speaks, reframe with your {trait} script — then take one visible step anyway.
Act for one hour as the person the vision already happened to: {traits}.
Before bed, replay today's aligned action and feel it count.

wearScriptTemplate:
Quiet spot, 4 minutes:

1. SETTLE (30s) — Slow exhale. Drop the day.
2. THE SCENE (2 min) — Step inside the vision as {name}. Not watching it — living it. What do you see, hear, feel in your hands? Let the emotion of 'already done' fill your chest: {traits}.
3. THE PERSON (45s) — 'The person this happened to — how do they carry themselves today?' Stand that way. {gesture}.
4. THE BRIDGE (30s) — Name today's one aligned action. See yourself doing it easily.
5. SEAL (15s) — Anchor. 'It's already in motion, and I am {name}.' Go make the step real.
